fields.name: Buy-from Vendor No.
fields.tooltip: Specifies the name of the vendor who delivered the items.

fields.name: Document No.
fields.tooltip: Specifies the number of the return shipment.

fields.name: Type
fields.tooltip: Specifies the line type.

fields.name: No.
fields.tooltip: Specifies the number of the involved entry or record, according to the specified number series.

fields.name: Location Code
fields.tooltip: Specifies the code for the location where items on the line are placed.

fields.name: Description
fields.tooltip: Specifies either the name of, or a description of, the item, general ledger account, or item charge.

fields.name: Description 2
fields.tooltip: Specifies information in addition to the description.

fields.name: Unit of Measure
fields.tooltip: Specifies the name of the item or resource's unit of measure, such as piece or hour.

fields.name: Quantity
fields.tooltip: Specifies the number of units of the item, general ledger account, or item charge specified on the line.

fields.name: Direct Unit Cost
fields.tooltip: Specifies the cost of one unit of the selected item or resource.

fields.name: Unit Cost (LCY)
fields.tooltip: Specifies the cost, in LCY, of one unit of the item or resource on the line.

fields.name: Gross Weight
fields.tooltip: Specifies the gross weight of one unit of the item. In the purchase statistics window, the gross weight on the line is included in the total gross weight of all the lines for the particular purchase document.

fields.name: Net Weight
fields.tooltip: Specifies the net weight of one unit of the item. In the purchase statistics window, the net weight on the line is included in the total net weight of all the lines for the particular purchase document.

fields.name: Units per Parcel
fields.tooltip: Specifies the number of units per parcel of the item. In the purchase statistics window, the number of units per parcel on the line helps to determine the total number of units for all the lines for the particular purchase document.

fields.name: Unit Volume
fields.tooltip: Specifies the volume of one unit of the item. In the purchase statistics window, the volume of one unit of the item on the line is included in the total volume of all the lines for the particular purchase document.

fields.name: Appl.-to Item Entry
fields.tooltip: Specifies the number of the item ledger entry that the document or journal line is applied to.

fields.name: Shortcut Dimension 1 Code
fields.tooltip: Specifies the code for Shortcut Dimension 1, which is one of two global dimension codes that you set up in the General Ledger Setup window.

fields.name: Shortcut Dimension 2 Code
fields.tooltip: Specifies the code for Shortcut Dimension 2, which is one of two global dimension codes that you set up in the General Ledger Setup window.

fields.name: Job No.
fields.tooltip: Specifies the number of the related project.

fields.name: Quantity Invoiced
fields.tooltip: Specifies how many units of the item on the line have been posted as invoiced.

fields.name: Pay-to Vendor No.
fields.tooltip: Specifies the number of the vendor that you received the invoice from.

fields.name: Currency Code
fields.tooltip: Specifies the currency code for the amount on this line.

fields.name: Blanket Order No.
fields.tooltip: Specifies the number of the blanket order that the record originates from.

fields.name: Blanket Order Line No.
fields.tooltip: Specifies the number of the blanket order line that the record originates from.

fields.name: Variant Code
fields.tooltip: Specifies the variant of the item on the line.

fields.name: Bin Code
fields.tooltip: Specifies the bin where the items are picked or put away.

fields.name: Unit of Measure Code
fields.tooltip: Specifies how each unit of the item or resource is measured, such as in pieces or hours. By default, the value in the Base Unit of Measure field on the item or resource card is inserted.

fields.name: Nonstock
fields.tooltip: Specifies that this item is a catalog item.

fields.name: Item Reference No.
fields.tooltip: Specifies the referenced item number.

fields.name: Return Qty. Shipped Not Invd.
fields.tooltip: Specifies the quantity of the returned item that has been posted as shipped but that has not yet been posted as invoiced.

fields.name: Correction
fields.tooltip: Specifies the entry as a corrective entry. You can use the field if you need to post a corrective entry to an account.

fields.name: Return Order No.
fields.tooltip: Specifies the return order number this line is associated with.

fields.name: Return Reason Code
fields.tooltip: Specifies the code explaining why the item was returned.

fields.name: Buy-from Vendor Name
fields.tooltip: Specifies the name of the vendor who delivered the items.
